title: A3 now posted on accepi
content: Assignment A3 is now available on accepi. It covers Lecture 3 and parts of Lecture 4. Please consider reading ahead from the remaining of Lecture 3 and the first half of Lecture 4 and start working on this assignment early. It's a long assignment and you won't have to do it in the last day. Please manage your time accordingly.
